evals.prompt: Plan a 10-second Nsight Systems capture for a Kit app running in a container where CPU sampling and GPU metrics are unavailable.
evals.expected_output: Uses container-safe nsys settings with no CPU sampling or GPU metrics and records limitations.
assertions: Uses NVTX/Vulkan/CUDA/OSRT or explains reducing OSRT if blocked
Does not use sudo by default
Records missing CPU sampling/governor control as a limitation

evals.prompt: I need full CPU sampling and GPU metrics for an Isaac Sim benchmark on a host.
evals.expected_output: Provides full host nsys flags but keeps sudo/sysctl/GPU-counter changes opt-in and approval-gated.
assertions: Tries non-sudo nsys first or clearly gates sudo -E
Includes CPU sampling and GPU metrics only for allowed hosts
Avoids wrapping the whole command in sudo prlimit by default
Mentions fallback without GPU metrics if ERR_NVGPUCTRPERM occurs
